title: El Mito de la Proteina
setting: Dark premium kitchen with black marble counter, single dramatic spotlight from top-left, purple LED strip ambient light in background, shallow depth of field, consistent camera height, moody cinematic color grading

scenes.prompt: Dramatic close-up of protein shake being poured in slow motion, dark moody kitchen with purple neon backlighting, liquid splashing with frozen droplets, cinematic shallow depth of field, professional food videography, 9:16 vertical
scenes.text: El mito de la proteina que nadie cuenta
scenes.voiceover: Hay un mito sobre la proteina del que nadie habla.

scenes.prompt: Overhead flat lay of high-protein foods: chicken breast, eggs, greek yogurt, lentils, fish, arranged on dark slate surface, dramatic side lighting with violet color grading, premium food photography, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: La mayoria piensa que necesita 200 gramos de proteina al dia. Pero la ciencia dice otra cosa.

scenes.prompt: Athletic person in a dark premium gym lifting weights with perfect form, purple ambient lighting, sweat glistening, dramatic rim light, professional sports videography, shallow depth of field, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Los estudios demuestran que entre 1.6 y 2.2 gramos por kilo es suficiente para el maximo crecimiento muscular.

scenes.prompt: Abstract visualization of protein molecules breaking into amino acids, colorful particles in dark space, neon violet and coral palette, scientific yet artistic, clean modern aesthetic, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Comer mas proteina de eso NO construye mas musculo. Tu cuerpo simplemente no puede usarla toda.

scenes.prompt: Person smiling while using a sleek dark-themed nutrition tracking app on their phone, cozy kitchen with warm coral accent lighting, close-up of hands and screen, premium lifestyle, 9:16 vertical
scenes.text: Manda esto a tu compi de gym
scenes.voiceover: Guarda esto y mandalo a tu compi de gym que se toma 5 batidos al dia.
